steps.title: Find each minimum
steps.content: The table values in the original explanation show females traveled least in the cold-dry season at 9.28 km/day, and males traveled least in the cold-dry season at 15.81 km/day.

steps.title: Compare the seasons
steps.content: Choice B gives hot-dry for males; Choice C gives hot-dry for females and monsoon for males; Choice D gives monsoon for both. Choice A identifies the cold-dry season for both females and males. The answer is A.
